seo.title: PII Filtering for AI Agents in AG2 Agents
seo.description: How to detect and fix pii filtering for ai agents in AG2 agents. Framework-specific detection, fixes, and Vex automation.

content.intro: In AG2, PII Filtering for AI Agents manifests as agents inadvertently leaking sensitive personal information during multi-agent conversations, especially in group chats where context sharing amplifies exposure risks. The framework's enhanced group chat capabilities and speaker selection mechanisms cause PII to propagate rapidly across agents without built-in sanitization. This is particularly dangerous in code execution agents that may embed PII in generated scripts or file outputs shared within the conversation flow.

howItManifests.scenario: Customer support group chat with user data sharing
howItManifests.symptom: Agents quote full email addresses and phone numbers from conversation history
howItManifests.impact: Immediate GDPR/CCPA violation with traceable data leakage

howItManifests.scenario: Code execution agent processing user-uploaded files
howItManifests.symptom: Generated Python scripts contain hardcoded API keys and database credentials
howItManifests.impact: Security breach enabling unauthorized system access

howItManifests.scenario: Multi-agent research conversation with web scraping
howItManifests.symptom: Agents share scraped personal profiles including names, locations, and social media handles
howItManifests.impact: Mass privacy violation across multiple data subjects

howItManifests.scenario: Speaker selection in debate groups referencing user profiles
howItManifests.symptom: Next speaker receives unfiltered conversation history with PII from previous turns
howItManifests.impact: Exponential PII amplification through conversation turns

fixes.description: AG2 code agent wrapper that scrubs PII from generated code before execution

vexAutomation.heading: Automating PII Filtering for AI Agents Detection with Vex
vexAutomation.description:
Vex integrates seamlessly with AG2 through message hooks, automatically scanning every agent message for PII using advanced regex patterns and ML classifiers. When PII is detected, Vex can either block the message, automatically redact sensitive data, or route it to a human reviewer while allowing conversation to continue safely. The platform provides real-time dashboards showing PII exposure rates by agent, conversation type, and speaker selection patterns specific to AG2's group chat dynamics.

Vex's AG2 integration automatically instruments all group chats and registers as a message hook without code changes. It captures complete conversation traces including speaker transitions and context windows, enabling root-cause analysis of PII propagation patterns. Automated remediation includes one-click policy deployment across all AG2 deployments with compliance reporting for GDPR/CCPA audits.
vexAutomation.code:
from vex_sdk import Vex
vex = Vex(api_key='your-vex-key')

from ag2 import GroupChat

@vex.register_hook('pii_filter_ag2')
def ag2_pii_monitor(messages):
    '''AG2 PII monitoring hook'''
    alerts = []
    for msg in messages:
        findings = detect_pii_regex(msg.content)
        if findings:
            alert = {
                'agent': msg.sender,
                'conversation_id': msg.conversation_id,
                'pii_findings': findings,
                'action': 'redact'
            }
            alerts.append(alert)
            # Auto-redact
            msg.content = redact_pii_filter(msg.content)
    if alerts:
        vex.log_alerts(alerts, severity='high')
    return messages

# Auto-register with all AG2 group chats
groupchat = GroupChat(agents=[...], hooks=[ag2_pii_monitor])

cta.heading: Detect and Fix This Automatically with Vex
cta.description: Install Vex with `pip install ag2 vex-sdk` and eliminate PII risks across all your AG2 agents in minutes
